description:
Deed of gift, signed by Breakhot b. Elazar. The other signatures are not preserved. The parties  Abu al-Muna, and Tamim ha-Parnas. This Tamim is known from other document relating to the pious foundations: TS 8J11.7d (from 1182, published Gil, Pious foundations, no. 82) and TS 8J11.7a-b (Gil, ibid. no. 88). In the bottom what has left from the establishment of the deed, only the name Tiqva b. Yefet survived. 
Written by Mevorakh b. Natan (1150-1181). AA
description_he: שטר מתנה, חתום על ידי ברכות בן אלעזר; הצדדים: אבו אל-מונא ותמים הפרנס; נכתב על ידי מבורך בן נתן (1150-1181)
